parameters.query:
SELECT
  u.id,
  u.name,
  u.email,
  u.phone_number,
  u.created_at AS registration_date,
  MIN(a.start_datetime) AS first_appointment,
  COUNT(a.id) AS total_appointments
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN appointments a ON a.patient_id = u.id
WHERE u.is_sales = true
  AND u.created_at::date BETWEEN $1::date AND $2::date
GROUP BY u.id, u.name, u.email, u.phone_number, u.created_at
ORDER BY u.created_at DESC

WITH last_activity AS (
  SELECT patient_id AS user_id, MAX(start_datetime) AS last_date
  FROM appointments
  WHERE status != 'cancelled'
  GROUP BY patient_id
  UNION ALL
  SELECT paciente_id AS user_id, MAX(fecha_sesion) AS last_date
  FROM sesiones_clinicas
  GROUP BY paciente_id
  UNION ALL
  SELECT paciente_id AS user_id, MAX(fecha_sesion) AS last_date
  FROM sesiones
  GROUP BY paciente_id
),
patient_last AS (
  SELECT user_id, MAX(last_date) AS last_activity_date
  FROM last_activity
  GROUP BY user_id
),
patient_debt AS (
  SELECT
    user_id,
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN currency = 'UYU' THEN total - paid_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS debt_uyu,
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN currency = 'USD' THEN total - paid_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS debt_usd
  FROM invoices
  WHERE is_sales = true
    AND status = 'booked'
    AND payment_state IN ('unpaid', 'partially_paid')
  GROUP BY user_id
)
SELECT
  u.id,
  u.name AS patient_name,
  u.phone_number,
  u.email,
  u.appointment_date AS alta_medica_date,
  pl.last_activity_date,
  CASE
    WHEN pl.last_activity_date IS NOT NULL
    THEN CURRENT_DATE - pl.last_activity_date::date
    ELSE NULL
  END AS days_inactive,
  CASE
    WHEN u.appointment_date IS NOT NULL THEN 'alta_medica'
    ELSE 'inactividad'
  END AS inactivity_reason,
  COALESCE(pd.debt_uyu, 0) AS debt_uyu,
  COALESCE(pd.debt_usd, 0) AS debt_usd
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN patient_last pl ON pl.user_id = u.id
LEFT JOIN patient_debt pd ON pd.user_id = u.id
WHERE u.is_sales = true
  AND u.is_active = true
  AND (
    pl.last_activity_date IS NULL
    OR pl.last_activity_date::date < $1::date
  )
  AND ($2::text != 'true' OR u.appointment_date IS NOT NULL)
  AND (
    $3::text != 'true'
    OR (
      u.appointment_date IS NULL
      AND (
        COALESCE(pd.debt_uyu, 0) > 0
        OR COALESCE(pd.debt_usd, 0) > 0
      )
    )
  )
ORDER BY pl.last_activity_date ASC NULLS FIRST

WITH step_doctor AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (steps.sequence_id)
    steps.sequence_id,
    COALESCE(sesion.doctor_id, a.assignee_id) AS doctor_id
  FROM treatment_seq_steps steps
  LEFT JOIN sesiones_clinicas sesion ON sesion.id = steps.sesion_id
  LEFT JOIN appointments a ON a.id = steps.appointment_id
  WHERE sesion.doctor_id IS NOT NULL OR a.assignee_id IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY
    steps.sequence_id,
    CASE WHEN steps.sesion_id IS NOT NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
    steps.step_position DESC
)
SELECT
  ts.id,
  u.name AS patient_name,
  u.phone_number,
  sc.name AS service_name,
  COALESCE(sc.category, 'Sin categoría') AS category,
  COALESCE(doc.name, 'Sin asignar') AS doctor_name,
  ts.started_at,
  ts.status,
  COUNT(steps.id)::int AS total_steps,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN steps.milestone_status = 'done'    THEN 1 END)::int AS done_steps,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN steps.milestone_status = 'pending' THEN 1 END)::int AS pending_steps,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN steps.milestone_status = 'waiting' THEN 1 END)::int AS waiting_steps,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN steps.milestone_status = 'alert'   THEN 1 END)::int AS alert_steps,
  CASE WHEN ts.started_at IS NOT NULL
    THEN (CURRENT_DATE - ts.started_at::date)::int
    ELSE NULL
  END AS days_active,
  CASE WHEN MAX(steps.updated_at) IS NOT NULL
    THEN (CURRENT_DATE - MAX(steps.updated_at)::date)::int
    ELSE NULL
  END AS days_since_last_step,
  json_agg(
    json_build_object(
      'step_position', steps.step_position,
      'step_name', steps.step_name,
      'milestone_status', steps.milestone_status
    ) ORDER BY steps.step_position
  ) FILTER (WHERE steps.id IS NOT NULL) AS steps_detail
FROM treatment_sequences ts
JOIN users u ON u.id = ts.patient_id
JOIN service_catalog sc ON sc.id = ts.service_id
LEFT JOIN step_doctor sd ON sd.sequence_id = ts.id
LEFT JOIN users doc ON doc.id = sd.doctor_id
LEFT JOIN treatment_seq_steps steps ON steps.sequence_id = ts.id
WHERE ts.started_at::date BETWEEN $1::date AND $2::date
  AND ($3::text = 'all' OR ts.status = $3::text)
GROUP BY ts.id, u.name, u.phone_number, sc.name, sc.category, doc.name, ts.started_at, ts.status
HAVING ($4::text = 'all' OR COUNT(CASE WHEN steps.milestone_status = $4::text THEN 1 END) > 0)
ORDER BY ts.started_at DESC
